---
title: "Stephen Taroniara"
---

## Stephen Taroniara

**Dates:** (<i>c.</i>1846-1871)

### Description

Melanesian missionary and martyr

### Biography

A native of San Cristobal in the Solomon Islands, he died with Patteson.

### Letters

- Letter from 14 May 1872
- Letter from [Norfolk Island, 18 July 1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
